workflows.name: Supplier Source Setup
workflows.start_state: A business has supplier accounts, contacts, price sheets, service tables, or portal access outside Source-Blendr.
user_actions: Create vendor profile
Record account details and contacts
Choose import method
Group or designate preferred vendors
system_actions: Track source type and import status
Prepare source records for product and service import
workflows.end_state: Supplier sources are available for product, service, cost, availability, and performance workflows.

workflows.name: Product And Service Aggregation
workflows.start_state: Supplier product or service data is available through files, manual entry, documents, or connections.
user_actions: Import products
Import services and service pricing tables
Map supplier fields
Review missing or conflicting data
Approve records for the unified asset library
system_actions: Store supplier-specific costs, descriptions, specifications, images, documents, turnaround times, and availability
workflows.end_state: Products and services are standardized in the unified asset library.

workflows.name: Asset Organization And Discovery
workflows.start_state: Normalized products, services, bundles, recipes, documents, and catalog assets exist in the workspace.
user_actions: Categorize and tag assets
Create collections, project folders, and saved views
Search across vendors, products, services, bundles, and recipes
Archive, merge, or update records
system_actions: Maintain categories, tags, brands, collections, and saved views
Expose universal and filtered search results
workflows.end_state: Users can reliably find, curate, and manage supplier assets for pricing and resale workflows.

workflows.name: Cost, Pricing, And Margin Management
workflows.start_state: Products, services, labor, shipping, packaging, setup fees, or installation costs are available.
user_actions: Define product and service pricing rules
Set margin thresholds and approval rules
Apply customer, group, wholesale, retail, or promotional pricing
Review cost breakdown and margin outputs
system_actions: Apply markup, margin, quantity break, tier, labor, and contract pricing logic
Flag pricing approvals when thresholds are missed
workflows.end_state: Offerings have controlled resale prices and visible margins.

workflows.name: Bundle And Production Recipe Creation
workflows.start_state: Users need to package products, services, labor, shipping, packaging, or setup fees into reusable resale offerings.
user_actions: Select products and services
Add labor, setup, shipping, packaging, or installation components
Save bundle or production recipe templates
Review aggregate costs and prices
system_actions: Update pricing when component costs change
workflows.end_state: Reusable bundles and production recipes are available for catalogs, price books, quotes, and proposals.

workflows.name: Catalog, Price Book, Quote, And Proposal Generation
workflows.start_state: Approved products, services, bundles, recipes, prices, and margins are available.
user_actions: Select customer, industry, project, or team context
Choose offerings and fields
Generate catalog, price book, quote, or proposal
Share or export the output
Track quote status and revisions
workflows.end_state: A customer-ready sales output is generated from current source-of-truth data.

workflows.name: Monitoring, Automation, And Intelligence
workflows.start_state: Supplier products, services, costs, availability, quotes, catalogs, and margins exist in Source-Blendr.
user_actions: Configure alerts, sync schedules, and approval workflows
Review pricing, availability, inventory, and margin changes
Use AI assistance for categorization, descriptions, search, pricing suggestions, catalog creation, or quote drafting
workflows.end_state: Users can detect supplier changes, protect margins, and accelerate catalog or quote work with automation and AI assistance.

workflow_relationships.relationship: Supplier source records provide context for product and service aggregation.
Normalized assets must exist before reliable organization, search, and discovery.
Curated products and services feed pricing, cost, and margin rules.
Bundles and recipes require cost and pricing logic for component aggregation.
Customer-facing outputs can include products, services, bundles, and production recipes.
Monitoring and automation can trigger pricing recalculation, margin alerts, and approval workflows.

assumptions.assumption: Initial workflows can be asynchronous and review-based; real-time supplier synchronization and AI automation can be phased after core asset, pricing, and output workflows are validated.
